nasb.text: That they may possess the remnant of Edom And all the nations who are called by My name,” Declares the Lord who does this.

esv.text: that they may possess the remnant of Edom and all the nations who are called by my name,” declares the Lord who does this.

cnv.text: 好使他們獲得以東所餘剩的， 以及所有稱為我名下的國。” 這是行這些事的耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 这样，以色列人必拥有以东所剩的和所有属于我名下的国家。 这是要成就这事的耶和华说的。”
